roles.title: Chief of Staff
roles.company_description: Fintech homeowner membership & loyalty platform. Ex-Uber, Amex, Robinhood founding team. Austin, TX.
roles.funding: Series A, $33M total (latest: $24M strategic round, Aug 2025)
roles.why_matches: Repeat-founder fintech team needs a strategic right-hand in Austin; MBA + Deloitte consulting background is a strong signal for this CEO-adjacence role.
roles.salary_range: $130K-$190K + equity (typical Austin CoS at Series A)

roles.title: Chief of Staff
roles.company_description: Austin-based platform company; COO-adjacent strategy and analytics role.
roles.why_matches: Works directly with COO on internal reporting and analytical deep-dives — direct fit for Deloitte ops analytics background and data fluency.

roles.title: Chief of Staff, Strategy & Ops
roles.company_description: People analytics + executive network SaaS platform used by Figma, Notion, OpenAI CHROs. $50M raised from Accel, EQT, Menlo.
roles.why_matches: Supports CEO/GM on AI workflows and GTM strategy — Tyler's intersection of consulting rigor, data analytics, and Next.js/Python builds is unusually rare and valuable here.

roles.title: Strategic Operations Lead
roles.company_description: Restaurant SaaS platform (websites, online ordering). Series C unicorn — $120M raised at $1B valuation (May 2025). Remote-first. 10,000+ restaurant customers.
roles.why_matches: First hire on strategic ops team, partnering with COO/Chief of Staff to own cross-functional initiatives during hyper-growth — perfect for a consulting-background operator who can build from zero.

roles.title: AI Operations Strategy Director
roles.company_description: Leading real estate marketplace, subsidiary of News Corp. Austin, TX office. 1,000+ employees.
roles.why_matches: Directs 5 AI Solutions Engineers to ship AI-powered workflow automation — Python/data automation skills plus consulting-led strategic thinking align perfectly with OTE and scope.

roles.title: Chief of Staff
roles.company_description: Utility SaaS platform (water, electric, gas). Backed by Norwest Venture Partners + Insight Partners (2026 investment). ~285 employees.
roles.why_matches: Strategic operator role supporting SVP of Client Solutions — consulting mindset (Deloitte) and cross-functional ops execution are explicitly the profile this role targets.

roles.title: Chief of Staff, Strategy
roles.company_description: Healthcare technology platform for independent primary care ACOs. Series F unicorn, $3.5B valuation, $1.18B total raised, ~1,574 employees. Remote-first.
roles.why_matches: Partners with Chief Strategy Officer to align strategic priorities and advance high-impact initiatives — MBA + multi-stakeholder strategy execution from Deloitte is near-exact match.

roles.title: Chief of Staff – Engineering
roles.company_description: Same company — separate CoS opening supporting the CTO.
roles.why_matches: Supporting CTO on strategic initiatives is a strong match given Tyler's technical fluency (Next.js, Python, TypeScript) — uncommon among pure MBA/consulting profiles.

roles.title: Chief of Staff
roles.company_description: Agentic AI platform for commercial real estate operations — LLM-driven data recommendations. YC S22, $18M Series A, $35M valuation. Investors: Fifth Wall, CRV, Accel, NFX.
roles.why_matches: Strategic partner to exec team at AI-native company — Tyler's unique combo of data analytics, Python/TypeScript, and consulting makes him unusually qualified vs. pure business candidates.

roles.title: Chief of Staff – Founder's Office
roles.company_description: Platform building global ecosystem for flexible living (tech/real estate adjacency). Remote-first, globally distributed.
roles.why_matches: CEO's strategic right hand blending strategy, operations, tech, and expansion — all four dimensions align with Tyler's profile.

roles.title: Strategic Program Director
roles.company_description: AI revenue workflow / sales engagement SaaS platform. Series G, $4.4B valuation, $489M total raised. ~1,484 employees. Remote-friendly.
roles.why_matches: Core member of Office of the CEO leading critical cross-functional initiatives — Deloitte consulting plus operational leadership is the archetype for this scaled COO-support role.

roles.title: Analyst/Sr. Analyst, Strategy & Business Operations
roles.company_description: Largest ABA therapy provider in the US. PE-backed by Charlesbank Capital Partners at $840M valuation (2022). Austin, TX HQ.
roles.why_matches: PE-backed platform building out internal strategy function — entry point to senior ops role at a PE portco, ideal for building PE-adjacent credentials close to home in Austin.

roles.title: Chief of Staff, Chief Commercial Officer
roles.company_description: Third distinct CoS opening at Aledade, supporting the CCO with GTM strategy and commercial operations.
roles.why_matches: GTM strategy and commercial operations focus leverages Tyler's consulting-to-operator arc and data fluency for a scaled healthcare tech unicorn.

roles.title: Chief of Staff and Director of Strategic Initiatives
roles.company_description: Mission-driven strategy consulting and advisory firm. Remote (contiguous US). Direct report to CEO.
roles.why_matches: Senior leadership team CoS with CEO reporting line — strategy consulting + MBA from Deloitte/Rice is precisely the credential FSG's mission-driven model requires.

roles.title: Director of Analytics (market benchmark)
roles.company_description: Built In Austin salary data: Director of Analytics roles averaging $158K at companies with 501-1,000 employees in Austin. 67+ active openings on LinkedIn.
roles.why_matches: Tyler's data analytics background combined with MBA and consulting foundation aligns with Austin's Director of Analytics profile, often at SaaS or tech-adjacent companies.
roles.salary_range: $158K average; range $130K-$210K depending on company stage

market_signals.temperature_notes: Chief of Staff roles are proliferating at growth-stage startups (Series B-D). Austin has 100+ active CoS openings on LinkedIn and 130+ Director Analytics openings on Glassdoor as of April 2026.

salary_trends.ai_fluency_premium: 10-20% over non-technical peers for roles with AI tooling requirements

in_demand_skills: AI fluency (Python, LLM tooling, workflow automation) — now a premium differentiator
MBA from top program (Rice, HBS, Wharton, Kellogg, etc.)
Data analytics / business intelligence / financial modeling
GTM strategy and commercial operations exposure
active_hiring_companies: Aledade (Remote, Series F — 3 separate CoS openings)
notable_trends: CoS roles proliferating at Series B-D companies scaling from 50-500 employees
AI-adjacent strategy/ops roles bucking 2026 tech salary stagnation (+1.6% YoY avg overall)
PE-backed multi-site operators (healthcare, services) building internal strategy functions with ex-consulting talent
Remote-first is broadly accepted — 9 of 15 roles above are fully remote
Austin is a genuine competitor to SF/NYC for strategy/ops talent; multiple remote companies list Austin as preferred hub
Tyler's Python/Next.js technical fluency is a standout differentiator vs. pure MBA candidates — explicitly call this out in AI-adjacent applications

summary.recommendation: Strong pipeline across Austin and remote. Apply immediately to Owner.com (COO-partner scope, listed pay), Realtor.com (Austin, OTE at top of range), and Aledade's CCO or Strategy CoS openings (Series F scale). Tyler's Python/AI fluency is a genuine differentiator — lead with it in cover letters for Knoetic, Cambio AI, and Realtor.com.
